envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Workflows at Stage 1 (Template-only) and Stage 2 (Recommendation-only) cannot execute. Workflow recommendations are advisory — Stage 3+ requires explicit Founder authorization per ADR-0081.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Starter / Pilot envelope keeps workflows at Stage 1 only — template education + Dandelion recommendation without surfacing them via Stage 2 to Twins yet. Stage 2+ deferred until Team plan or explicit pilot extension.

items.name: Onboarding Checklist (Stage 1 only)
items.human_readable_summary: Admin-visible template for pilot user onboarding. Stage 1 only at Starter / Pilot tier — Twin does not yet surface this as a recommendation.
items.model_usage_notes: Useful for Dandelion + Admin to walk the OOTB onboarding template during pilot setup. Stage 2 recommendation surface deferred to Team plan.
items.recommendation_purpose: Establish a known good baseline for new-user onboarding within the pilot.
items.safe_fallback: Admin walks the OOTB onboarding template manually without Twin assistance.
DMW_scope_implications: Operates within tenant + admin scope; no employee scope read
governance_review_points: Admin policy approval required before promoting to Stage 2 at a higher plan tier

items.name: Tomorrow's Executive Brief (Stage 1 only)
items.human_readable_summary: Admin-visible template surfacing a daily briefing structure. Stage 1 only at Starter / Pilot — the actual brief generation defers to Team plan + connector activation.
items.model_usage_notes: Template educates the pilot admin on the EA aha-moment shape per Wave 2.1 §22. No surfacing to non-admin Twins at this tier.
items.recommendation_purpose: Educate admin about EA daily-brief structure before broader rollout.
items.safe_fallback: Admin reviews the OOTB template independently.
DMW_scope_implications: Template-only; no executive memory scope read at this tier
governance_review_points: Stage 2+ promotion requires Team plan + admin policy approval

items.name: Offboarding Checklist (Stage 1 only)
items.human_readable_summary: Admin-visible template for pilot user offboarding. Stage 1 only at Starter / Pilot tier.
items.model_usage_notes: Useful for evaluation deployments to ensure clean offboarding without losing audit history per RULE 10 + ADR-0002.
items.recommendation_purpose: Preserve audit + DMW safety during pilot user offboarding.
items.safe_fallback: Admin walks offboarding manually; audit chain integrity preserved per ADR-0002.
DMW_scope_implications: Offboarding preserves audit history; DMW soft-delete only per RULE 10
governance_review_points: Audit history preserved regardless of plan tier
